mechanism_narrative: Federal funds rate declines below 1.0% signal monetary accommodation that reduces equity discount rates and increases present value of future corporate earnings. This mechanism operates continuously as a trend signal without requiring threshold activation.
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.05 over any 2-year rolling window, or positive 20-day forward returns occur in less than 55% of instances when FEDFUNDS < 1.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Unemployment rate rises above 7.5% signals labor market deterioration that triggers equity risk-off positioning and negative forward returns as investors anticipate earnings compression from reduced consumer spending and corporate hiring freezes.
failure_condition: Negative 20-day forward returns occur in less than 55% of instances when UNRATE > 7.5%, or Rank IC < 0.04 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Retail sales growth decelerates below 2% year-over-year while housing starts fall below 800k units, indicating joint demand weakness that compresses equity valuations through reduced revenue growth expectations and forward earnings revisions.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS growth < 2% YoY AND HOUST < 800k units
failure_condition: Positive 60-day forward returns occur in more than 50% of triggered instances, or the interaction term coefficient is not statistically significant (p > 0.10) in logistic regression over 5-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production index declines below 97.0 signals supply-side weakness and potential stagflation risk that increases equity volatility and produces negative forward returns as investors reprrice growth and inflation expectations simultaneously.
failure_condition: Negative 5-day forward returns occur in less than 60% of instances when INDPRO < 97.0, or Rank IC < 0.06 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll employment growth decelerates while unemployment rate rises simultaneously, indicating joint labor market deterioration that signals recession risk and triggers equity sell-offs through forward earnings downgrades and multiple compression.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS growth < 100k MoM AND UNRATE rises > 0.2pp in 1 month
failure_condition: Positive 20-day forward returns occur in more than 55% of triggered instances, or interaction coefficient is not significant (p > 0.10) in 3-year rolling logistic regressions.

mechanism_narrative: Inflation measured by CPI index accelerates above 3.5% while federal funds rate remains below 2.0%, indicating monetary policy lag that creates real rate compression and equity upside as investors anticipate policy normalization delay and continued asset price support.
failure_condition: Negative 60-day forward returns occur in more than 50% of triggered instances, or interaction term coefficient is not statistically significant (p > 0.10) in rolling 4-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP growth decelerates below 1.5% annualized while retail sales decline month-over-month, signaling demand-side recession risk that produces negative equity returns through earnings downgrades and increased equity risk premium.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 growth < 1.5% annualized AND RSAFS declines MoM
failure_condition: Positive 60-day forward returns occur in more than 55% of triggered instances, or interaction coefficient fails to reach statistical significance (p > 0.10) in any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production index rises above 99.0 while payroll employment grows above 150k monthly, indicating robust supply-side expansion that supports equity valuations through earnings growth and operating leverage in a tight labor market.
failure_condition: Negative 20-day forward returns occur in more than 50% of triggered instances, or interaction coefficient is not significant (p > 0.10) in rolling 2-year windows.
